diagrams.title: Critical Section Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the four sections of a process and where synchronization occurs
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where synchronization primitives are placed and understand the flow of process execution through protected and unprotected sections

diagrams.title: Race Condition Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing interleaving of two processes accessing shared variable showing incorrect result due to race condition
elements: Process A: Read count(5) → increment → Write count(6)
Process B: Read count(5) → increment → Write count(6)
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate how race conditions cause data inconsistency when operations are not atomic and interleave incorrectly

diagrams.title: Semaphore States
diagrams.description: Visual representation of semaphore counter and queue states during wait and signal operations
diagrams.purpose: Understand how semaphore counter tracks resources and how blocked processes are managed in the queue
